# Managed Services that Keep Your Analytics Running

Capitalize provides managed services for your analytics and automation platforms — keeping them healthy, secure, and evolving so your teams can focus on decisions, not downtime.

[Contact Us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

### Not sure where to start? Two fast, low-risk ways.

Explore where managed services can relieve the most pressure and create the most impact for your team.

#### Ideation Session

A focused ideation conversation where we map your current reality — firefights, bottlenecks, and wish-list improvements.

- **Clarify What to Hand Off:** Identify which platform tasks drain the most time and should shift to a managed partner.
- **Spot High-Impact Opportunities:** Surface the areas where proactive monitoring, optimization, or transformation would deliver the biggest wins.
- **Shape a Potential Model:** Walk away with a clearer sense of what a right-sized managed services engagement could include for you.

[Schedule Now](https://share.hsforms.com/1aJgr178uTxeiR2Wn_Ct2jgdko8c)

#### Readiness Assessment

Understand how ready you are for managed services — and where you stand to gain the most.

- **Reveal Hidden Risks:** See where your current support approach leaves you vulnerable to outages, performance issues, or key-person dependencies.

- **Quantify the Strain:** Understand how much effort your team is spending on “keeping the lights on” versus strategic work.

- **Highlight Value Levers:** Pinpoint the areas (KTLO, continuous improvement, or transformation) where managed services could create the fastest impact.


[Schedule Now](https://share.hsforms.com/1BNVIzv1GSVaFyIA1pXmJcwdko8c)

### Reliable, Optimized, Always-On Analytics Support

Get help exactly where you need it — from targeted support in one area to a fully customized managed services package.

Platform Reliability & Support
Optimization
Adoption & Governance
Transformation

![](https://staging.capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/Check.svg)

###### Platform Administration & Upgrades

Server setup, patching, and annual upgrades: keep environments current and supported.

![](https://staging.capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/Check.svg)

###### User & Access Management

Onboarding/offboarding: manage licenses, permissions, and collections so the right people have the right access.

![](https://staging.capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/Check.svg)

###### Health Monitoring & Outage Response

Platform monitoring and outage support: detect issues early and respond quickly when things go wrong.

[Contact Us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

![](https://staging.capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/Check.svg)

###### Enhancement Intake & Prioritization

Ideation & intake: capture, vet, and prioritize improvement requests from the business.

![](https://staging.capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/Check.svg)

###### Release & SDLC Management

SDLC phase management: manage changes through dev, test, and prod with automated deployments between environments.

![](https://staging.capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/Check.svg)

###### Performance & Capacity Optimization

Active job monitoring and demand forecasting: identify bottlenecks and tune workloads before they impact users.

[Contact us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

![](https://staging.capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/Check.svg)

###### Usage & Telemetry Analytics

Customer-managed telemetry and desktop usage dashboards: understand who’s using what, and where value is created.

![](https://staging.capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/Check.svg)

###### Training & Enablement

Training and certification: upskill users and admins so more of the organization can confidently self-serve.

![](https://staging.capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/Check.svg)

###### Configuration & Governance Coaching

Configurauration revie/recommendations: aligns settings, standards, and governance with best practices.

[Contact us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

![](https://staging.capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/Check.svg)

###### Platform Modernization Projects

Migration targets from designer to server: move critical assets to scalable, governed environments.

![](https://staging.capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/Check.svg)

###### Strategic Roadmapping

Transformation planning: identify opportunities to consolidate platforms, modernize architecture, and introduce new capabilities.

![](https://staging.capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/Check.svg)

###### Change Adoption Support

Guided rollout and communication: help stakeholders adopt new ways of working as your environment evolves.

[Contact us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

#### Schedule a 30-Minute Consultation

Tell us how you’re supporting your analytics and automation platforms today, and we’ll show you how managed services can reduce risk, free up your team, and unlock more value.

[Talk to An Expert](https://share.hsforms.com/1mcbE7TlTTEOh3rSC-2DCuAdko8c)

### Reduce Platform Risk Without Overloading Your Team

With Capitalize Managed Services, you get a dedicated team that proactively maintains and tunes your environment so your business can depend on it.

- **Fewer Fire Drills:** Cut down on unplanned outages, broken dashboards, and last-minute scrambles that derail your team’s day.
- **Stronger Platform Health:** Improve stability, performance, and security with consistent monitoring, patching, and best-practice configuration.
- **Time Back for High-Value Work:** Free your internal team from routine support tasks so they can focus on strategy, innovation, and partnering with the business.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Process-Automation-1-1024x741.png)

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Data-Strategy-2-1024x741.png)

### A Managed Services Model That Adapts As You Grow

Our approach to managed services is intentionally flexible. As your environment and priorities change, your managed services model changes with you.

- **Right-Sized Engagement:** Choose the level of coverage and involvement that fits your current team capacity, budget, and risk tolerance.

- **Clear Rhythm of Collaboration:** Work within a predictable cadence of check-ins, reviews, and planning sessions tailored to your organization.

- **Pathway to Transformation:** Use managed services as a foundation to drive bigger initiatives like modernization, migrations, and new platform capabilities.


### A Managed Services Model Built Around Your Business

We combine steady, reliable support with proactive guidance so your platforms keep improving — not just staying online.

1

Understand Your Environment & Goals

We start by learning your platforms, current pain points, and what “good” looks like for your teams. Together, we align on scope, responsibilities, and the right service tier.

2

Stabilize, Standardize & Automate

We put monitoring, processes, and SLAs in place to reduce noise and risk. From there, we standardize how changes move through environments and automate wherever possible.

3

Optimize & Transform Over Time

Once the lights are reliably on, we shift focus to continuous improvement and transformation — finding new ways to increase adoption, performance, and business value.

### Let Capitalize Run Your Platforms — So You Can Run the Business.

[Schedule Now](https://share.hsforms.com/1mcbE7TlTTEOh3rSC-2DCuAdko8c)

Tell us how you’re supporting your analytics and automation platforms today, and we’ll show you how managed services can reduce risk, free up your team, and unlock more value.

**Schedule a 30-minute complimentary Managed Services review**

[Skip to content](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/financial-planning-analysis-2/#content)

# Give Your FP&A Team Time to Actually Plan

Capitalize helps FP&A teams automate data collection, consolidation, and reporting so they can focus on strategy, scenario modeling, and answering the questions that matter most to the business.

[Talk to an FP&A Expert](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

#### Our Technology Platforms

![Transparent workday Logo 165x60 (1)](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-workday-Logo-165x60-1.png)

![Transparent Vena 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Vena-165x60-1.png)

![Transparent BlackLine logo 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-BlackLine-logo-165x60-1.png)

![Transparent Alteryx Logo 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Alteryx-Logo-165x60-1-e1771366817411.png)

![Transparent workday Logo 165x60 (1)](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-workday-Logo-165x60-1.png)

![Transparent Vena 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Vena-165x60-1.png)

![Transparent BlackLine logo 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-BlackLine-logo-165x60-1.png)

![Transparent Alteryx Logo 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Alteryx-Logo-165x60-1-e1771366817411.png)

![Transparent workday Logo 165x60 (1)](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-workday-Logo-165x60-1.png)

![Transparent Vena 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Vena-165x60-1.png)

![Transparent BlackLine logo 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-BlackLine-logo-165x60-1.png)

![Transparent Alteryx Logo 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Alteryx-Logo-165x60-1-e1771366817411.png)

### The Reality: FP&A Is Expected to Know Everything

Financial Planning & Analysis teams carry a unique burden.  They’re expected to holistically understand the organization’s financial position, model the impact of nearly any scenario, and respond to a constant stream of questions and changes from executives. It sounds complicated — but it’s even more complicated than it sounds.

![finance close month end bi business intelligence report dashboard](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/finance-close-month-end-bi-business-intelligence-report-dashboard-.png)

### Data from Everywhere, Standardization from Nowhere

If every team agreed on a simple way to pass data back and forth, FP&A would be thrilled. But they don’t.

Instead, FP&A teams receive data via:

- Spreadsheets and email attachments

- Static reports and ad hoc exports

- Direct database access (when they’re lucky)

- And sometimes… phone calls and screenshots


All of that information — structured and unstructured — must be cleansed, normalized, and consolidated before any real FP&A work can even begin.

### What We Do for FP&A Teams

We help FP&A teams modernize their data, analytics, and reporting to:

- Spend less time wrangling data and more time advising the business.


- Quickly model new scenarios and answer “what if?” questions.


- Standardize reports and dashboards executives rely on.


- Build skills in tools like Power BI, Alteryx, Snowflake, and modern FPM/CPM platforms.


![Accounting software](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/accounting-software-1024x683.jpg)

## Deep FP&A Experience You Can Count On

### 20+

Years

### 1,500+

Projects

### 1,000+

Clients

### 4

CPAs

### Modern Analytics & Automation for FP&A

We design solutions that respect the pace and pressure of FP&A, while giving you a more reliable, scalable foundation.

Data Foundation
Modeling & Forecasting
Reporting & Dashboards
Enablement & Upskilling

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Risk-Based Scoping

Use data-driven analysis of transactions, trends, and anomalies to target higher-risk areas and prioritize audit focus.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Population Completeness Checks

Validate that populations are complete and reliable before sampling, reducing rework and disputes later.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Insightful Planning Dashboards

Provide leadership with dashboards that tie risks, controls, and results together in a clear, visual way.

[Contact us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Automated Control Testing

Automate repeatable tests (like access, segregation of duties, and transactional thresholds) using repeatable workflows.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Evidence Packages On Demand

Generate standardized, audit-ready evidence packages with a few clicks instead of manual extraction every cycle.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Clear, Repeatable Documentation

Create consistent, data-backed documentation that external auditors and regulators can review and trust.

[Contact us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Continuous Control Monitoring

Monitor key controls and processes throughout the period, not just at quarter- or year-end.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Exception-Driven Workflows

Surface anomalies, outliers, and potential violations so your team can focus on investigation — not data chasing.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Real-Time Dashboards

Provide Audit, Finance, and Operations leaders with up-to-date views of control health and emerging risks.

[Contact us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Integrated Data Pipelines

Connect ERP, HR, CRM, and operational systems into a central, governed environment for audit use.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Standardized Queries and Scripts

Replace one-off data pulls with reusable, documented queries that anyone on the team can run.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Automated Support

Feed test results directly into standardized workpaper formats so documentation is faster and more consistent.

[Contact us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

### Not sure where to start? Two fast, low-risk options.

Explore where managed services can relieve the most pressure and create the most impact for your team.

#### Ideation Session

A focused ideation conversation where we map your current reality — firefights, bottlenecks, and wish-list improvements.

- **Clarify What to Hand Off:** Identify which platform tasks drain the most time and should shift to a managed partner.
- **Spot High-Impact Opportunities:** Surface the areas where proactive monitoring, optimization, or transformation would deliver the biggest win.
- **Shape a Potential Model:** Walk away with a clearer sense of what a right-sized managed services engagement could include for you.

[Schedule Now](https://share.hsforms.com/1aJgr178uTxeiR2Wn_Ct2jgdko8c)

#### Readiness Assessment

Understand how ready you are for managed services — and where you stand to gain the most.

- **Reveal Hidden Risks:** See where your current support approach leaves you vulnerable to outages, performance issues, or key-person dependencies.

- **Quantify the Strain:** Understand how much effort your team is spending on “keeping the lights on” versus strategic work.

- **Highlight Value Levers:** Pinpoint the areas (KTLO, continuous improvement, or transformation) where managed services could create the fastest impact.


[Schedule Now](https://share.hsforms.com/1BNVIzv1GSVaFyIA1pXmJcwdko8c)

### Why FP&A Leaders Partner with Capitalize

FP&A doesn’t have the luxury of slowing down for a massive transformation project. You need practical improvements that fit into your existing cycles.

1

Deep analytics and finance experience

We understand both the technology and the realities of planning, forecasting, and executive expectations.

2

A focus on business outcomes

Our work is measured in hours saved, faster cycles, and better visibility — not just dashboards deployed.

3

Technology-agnostic guidance

We help you make the most of what you have and recommend tools that truly fit FP&A’s needs, not just IT’s preferences.

#### Schedule a 30-Minute Consultation

If your FP&A team is stuck in cumbersome tools for core planning and Excel for everything else, it’s time to rethink the foundation. Schedule a 30-minute call to see how we can help.

[Talk to An Expert](https://share.hsforms.com/1mcbE7TlTTEOh3rSC-2DCuAdko8c)

# Tax Analytics Solutions You Can Trust

Capitalize helps tax teams automate data collection, validation, and reporting so you can hit every deadline, reduce risk, and stop living in Excel-driven fire drills.

[Talk to an Expert](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

#### Our Technology Platforms

![Transparent Alteryx Logo 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Alteryx-Logo-165x60-1-e1771366817411.png)

![UiPath Logo Updated - Website Reel](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/UiPath-Logo-Updated-Website-Reel.png)

![power-bi](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/power-bi.png)

![Transparent Databricks logo 165x60 (2)](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Databricks-logo-165x60-2.png)

![Transparent Alteryx Logo 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Alteryx-Logo-165x60-1-e1771366817411.png)

![UiPath Logo Updated - Website Reel](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/UiPath-Logo-Updated-Website-Reel.png)

![power-bi](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/power-bi.png)

![Transparent Alteryx Logo 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Alteryx-Logo-165x60-1-e1771366817411.png)

![UiPath Logo Updated - Website Reel](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/UiPath-Logo-Updated-Website-Reel.png)

![power-bi](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/power-bi.png)

![Transparent Databricks logo 165x60 (2)](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Databricks-logo-165x60-2.png)

### Tax Operates Downstream — With Fixed Deadlines

Tax functions support a wide range of obligations across jurisdictions, tax types, and regulatory regimes — each with its own rules, data requirements, and filing timelines.

At the same time, tax teams depend on:

- Data produced by accounting, sales, payroll, and operational systems

- Regulatory requirements defined externally

- Statutory deadlines that do not adjust for upstream delays

When accounting close runs long or transaction data changes late in the process, tax timelines are impacted. Teams must still extract, validate, reconcile, and analyze data before filings can be completed.

The result is sustained time pressure, heightened compliance risk, and limited capacity for review — even when teams are operating effectively.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/accounting-1.jpg)

### The Data & Deadline Crunch in Tax

Tax teams operate downstream of nearly every core business process, yet remain bound by fixed statutory deadlines.

- **Reliant on upstream data readiness:** Tax calculations depend on timely and accurate data from accounting, billing, sales, payroll, and operational systems. When upstream close or transaction processes slip, tax timelines compress — even though filing deadlines remain fixed.

- **Responsible for validation and reconciliation:** While tax does not create source data, it is often the function that detects issues such as misclassified revenue, incorrect jurisdictional data, or incomplete transaction details. Identifying, reconciling, and coordinating corrections across teams becomes a recurring and time-sensitive effort.

- **Limited margin for error:** Delays or inaccuracies in filings can result in penalties, interest, amended returns, and increased audit exposure. As a result, tax teams must balance speed with accuracy under constant time pressure.

### What We Do for Tax Teams

Capitalize helps tax teams build the capability to work with their data more efficiently, confidently, and consistently.

Using tools such as Alteryx, Power BI, and cloud data platforms, we partner with tax professionals to:

- Reduce manual effort and spreadsheet risk, freeing teams to focus on review, analysis, and judgment rather than data wrangling

- Shorten tax cycles by creating repeatable, well-controlled data preparation and calculation processes

- Improve accuracy and audit readiness through transparent logic, documented workflows, and reproducible results

- Give tax leaders clearer visibility across entities and jurisdictions to support planning, prioritization, and risk management

![Accounting software](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/accounting-software-1024x683.jpg)

## Deep Tax Experience You Can Count On

### 20+

Years

### 1,500+

Projects

### 1,000+

Clients

### 4

CPAs

### Services for Tax Leaders & Tax Operations

We design solutions that respect the realities of tax deadlines, data dependencies, and audit scrutiny.

Data Integration
Indirect & Transaction Tax
Direct Tax & Forecasting
Reporting & Audit Readiness

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Centralized Tax Data

Bring together data from ERP, billing, CRM, HR/payroll, and other systems into a tax-ready data layer.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Automated Data Prep

Replace manual extracts and cleanup. Build repeatable workflows to cleanse, standardize, and map data to tax requirements.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Single Version of the Truth

Align definitions and sources. Ensure Tax is working from consistent, trusted numbers across entities and jurisdictions.

[Contact Us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Automated Transaction Checks

Validate taxability and rates: Use analytics to flag mis-coded orders, wrong jurisdictions, or missing exemption data.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Exception-Based Review:

Focus on the outliers: Let the system process the standard cases, so your team can concentrate on what’s unusual or high-risk.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Faster Compliance Cycles

Shorten return prep: Reduce the time spent assembling and reconciling data for filings, refunds, and true-ups.

[Contact Us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Data-Driven Provision Support

Improve provision accuracy: Automate data collection and calculations feeding your tax provision processes.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Scenario Analysis and Planning

Model tax impacts: Quickly evaluate how structural changes, acquisitions, or location shifts affect tax obligations.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Consolidated Tax Views

See the full picture: Build dashboards and reports that summarize tax positions across entities, regions, and tax types.

[Contact Us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Standardized Tax Reporting

Automate recurring reports: Build repeatable, refreshable reporting packages for leaders and regulators.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Embedded Documentation

Capture the process as you go: Document assumptions, calculations, and data sources automatically as workflows run.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Audit-Friendly Evidence

Be ready for questions: Generate clear, consistent support that tax authorities and auditors can review and understand.

[Contact Us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

### Why Tax Leaders Choose Capitalize

We understand both the complexity of tax and the power of modern data platforms.

1

Tax-aware analytics expertise

We know where tax processes break, where errors hide, and how better data can change the game.

2

Tool-agnostic, outcome-focused

We start with your process and definition of success, then recommend tools and architectures — not the other way around.

3

Proven process improvements

We’ve seen what works across tax departments and bring that experience to your unique environment.

#### Schedule a 30-Minute Consultation

If your tax department is bogged down by cumbersome, error-prone processes and you’re thinking, _“There has to be a better way,”_ there probably is. Let’s talk.

[Talk to An Expert](https://share.hsforms.com/1mcbE7TlTTEOh3rSC-2DCuAdko8c)

# Turn IT Into the Engine of Data-Driven Decisions

Capitalize helps IT leaders design and implement modern analytics solutions — so you can manage growing data demands, enable the business, and keep your environment secure and governed.

[Talk to an Expert](https://share.hsforms.com/1mcbE7TlTTEOh3rSC-2DCuAdko8c)

#### Our Technology Platforms

![Transparent New UiPath Logo 165x60 (2)](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-New-UiPath-Logo-165x60-2-e1771366854949.png)

### The New Reality for IT: More Data, More Requests, More Risk

Today’s technology teams collect and manage more data than ever before. At the same time:

- Business units want direct access to data.

- Suppliers and customers expect near real-time information.

- Leadership wants faster insights and better decisions.


With the growing volume of data and requests, IT faces new challenges _and_ massive opportunities. Handled well, this is the moment where IT stops being “the department of no” and becomes a true partner to the business.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/accounting-1.jpg)

### The Questions Every IT Leader Is Wrestling With

Across strategy, architecture, and day-to-day operations, IT leaders are being asked to make big, interconnected decisions that shape the future.

- **Data & architecture choices:** How do we balance centralization vs. decentralization, on-prem vs. cloud, and hybrid approaches?

- **Governance & control:** How do we manage access, security, change control, and version control without slowing the business down?

- **Tools & support model:** Which analytics and data tools do we standardize on, and how do we support them without creating tool sprawl?


### Empowering the Business Without Losing Control

Business users are more tech-savvy than ever, and tools like Tableau, Power BI, and Alteryx give them analytic power that used to live only in IT.

- **Enable self-service safely:** Give users governed access to the data and tools they need, within clear standards and guardrails.

- **Accelerate insight delivery:** Support faster, trusted analytics across functions by providing platforms, best practices, and reusable assets.

- **Avoid chaos and shadow IT:** Reduce conflicting data, duplicate efforts, and security gaps by aligning business enablement with IT oversight.


![Accounting software](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/accounting-software-1024x683.jpg)

- **Shape a Potential Model:** Walk away with a clearer sense of what a right-sized managed services engagement could include for you.

Capitalize helps marketing and sales operations teams automate data access, cleanup, and reporting — so you can focus on optimizing campaigns, improving pipeline, and driving revenue instead of fighting spreadsheets.

[Talk to an Expert](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

### Marketing & Sales Ops: Measured by the Numbers, Buried by the Data

Few parts of the business are as reliant on data to show success as marketing and sales operations.

Marketing must constantly answer:

- Which campaigns actually drive revenue and pipeline?

- How are channels impacting brand awareness and market share?

- What’s really working across A/B tests, modalities, and audiences?


Sales Operations must constantly deliver:

- Accurate, timely data to guide strategy and territory planning.

- Reliable pipeline and forecast visibility for leadership.

- Clean, trusted CRM data the sales team will actually use.


Everyone wants answers. But getting there is the hard part.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/featured-insights-2.png)

### The Revenue Ops Reality: Drowning in Data, Starved for Time

Marketing and Sales Operations are expected to prove what’s working and steer growth — but the data they need is scattered across platforms, plagued by quality issues, and held together with spreadsheets and late nights.

- **Disconnected platforms:** Google Analytics, social, CRM, marketing automation, and other systems don’t naturally tie together, forcing constant exports and manual blends.

- **Manual, error-prone processes:** Analysts and ops leaders spend countless hours cleaning fields, matching IDs, rebuilding the same Excel workbooks, and maintaining one-off reports.

- **Always-on fire drills:** Data quality battles in CRM, changing territories, and endless ad hoc requests keep teams working 50+ hours a week, acting as the human integration layer instead of strategic partners.


### What Capitalize Does for Marketing & Sales Operations Teams

Capitalize helps Marketing Ops and Sales Ops cut through data chaos — connecting platforms, automating workflows, and building the skills your team needs to deliver trusted, insight-ready reporting without living in Excel.

- **Simplified data access:** Connect key platforms (web, social, CRM, marketing automation, sales systems) so your team isn’t constantly exporting, stitching, and reformatting files.

- **Automated reporting & analysis:** Turn recurring manual tasks into repeatable workflows and dashboards, freeing time for optimization and strategic decisions.

- **Stronger data & teams:** Standardize and clean data so everyone trusts the numbers, while upskilling your analysts on tools like Power BI and Alteryx to build and maintain solutions in-house.


![Accounting software](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/accounting-software-1024x683.jpg)

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Self-Service Access with Guardrails

Give stakeholders curated, role-based views so they can answer their own questions safely.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Training & Upskilling

Coach your Marketing and Sales Ops analysts on the tools and techniques to extend automation and analytics on their own.

[Contact Us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

### Why Marketing & Sales Ops Teams Choose Capitalize

Marketing and Sales Ops teams come to Capitalize when they’re ready to get out of “spreadsheet survival mode” and into scalable, data-driven operations.

1

Deep operations experience

We understand campaign measurement, pipeline management, and the realities of supporting demanding revenue teams.

2

Technology-agnostic guidance

We help you get more out of the platforms you already own and recommend only what you truly need.

3

End-to-end transformation

From data access and process automation to dashboards and enablement, we help you change how work gets done — not just how reports look.

#### Schedule a 30-Minute Consultation

If you’re stuck in vendor or channel reports and Excel, constantly rebuilding the same analysis and scrambling to answer the latest ad hoc request, there’s a better way. Let’s talk!

[Talk to An Expert](https://share.hsforms.com/1mcbE7TlTTEOh3rSC-2DCuAdko8c)

[Skip to content](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/supply-chain-analytics/#content)

# Upgrade Your Supply Chain with Analytics That Can Keep Up

Capitalize helps supply chain, purchasing, and logistics teams automate data prep, streamline reporting, and unlock advanced analytics — so you can move beyond spreadsheets and focus on resilience, cost savings, and performance.

[Talk to an Expert](https://share.hsforms.com/1mcbE7TlTTEOh3rSC-2DCuAdko8c)

#### Our Technology Platforms

![alteryx](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/alteryx.png)

![snowflake](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/snowflake.png)

![Transparent Databricks logo 165x60 (2)](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Databricks-logo-165x60-2.png)

![Transparent New UiPath Logo 165x60 (2)](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-New-UiPath-Logo-165x60-2-e1771366854949.png)

![tableau](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/tableau.png)

![power-bi](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/power-bi.png)

![tableau](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/tableau.png)

![power-bi](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/power-bi.png)

![alteryx](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/alteryx.png)

![snowflake](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/snowflake.png)

![Transparent Databricks logo 165x60 (2)](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Databricks-logo-165x60-2.png)

![Transparent New UiPath Logo 165x60 (2)](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-New-UiPath-Logo-165x60-2-e1771366854949.png)

![tableau](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/tableau.png)

![power-bi](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/power-bi.png)

### The Reality: Your Supply Chain Has Outgrown Excel

Purchasing, supply chain, and logistics teams manage data that’s simply too large and too complex for traditional analyst techniques.

- Hundreds of suppliers
- Thousands (or millions) of SKUs
- Multiple plants, DCs, geographies, and channels

Ensuring the right materials, parts, and inventory are in the correct location, at the best price, when they’re needed requires serious analytical horsepower — but many teams are stuck in tools that weren’t built for the job.

![accounting team excel](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/accounting-team-excel.png)

### Buried in Spreadsheets Instead of Improving the Supply Chain

Across purchasing, supply chain, and logistics, teams are drowning in raw data from countless systems — spending so much time cleansing and compiling it that there’s little left for the strategic analysis they were hired to do.

- **Scattered, inconsistent data:** Information pours in from ERP, WMS, TMS, procurement platforms, vendor portals, and spreadsheets — each with different formats, levels of detail, and refresh cycles.

- **Slow, manual preparation:** Teams spend days or even weeks cleansing, compiling, and reconciling data before they can run a single meaningful analysis.

- **Lost opportunities to optimize:** By the time the data is usable, there’s little time left to analyze vendor spend, spot fraud or anomalies, or improve inventory, routing, and supplier strategies.


### What Capitalize Does for Supply Chain Teams

We help supply chain organizations move from manual, spreadsheet-heavy processes to modern, automated analytics built on tools like Alteryx, Power BI, and cloud data platforms — so your team can finally focus on high-value analysis instead of data wrangling.

- **Automate repetitive work:** Replace manual extracts, cleansing, and reconciliations with repeatable, automated workflows that run in minutes, not days.

- **Unlock deeper insights:** Analyze vendor spend, performance, fraud risks, and network efficiency at scale using geospatial, predictive, and forecasting models.

- **Enable your team:** Equip your supply chain analysts to own and extend the solutions themselves, without relying on IT or black-box tools.


![Accounting software](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/accounting-software-1024x683.jpg)

## Deep Experience You Can Count On

### 20+

Years

### 1,500+

Projects

### 1,000+

Clients

### 100+

Experts

### Services for Purchasing, Supply Chain & Logistics Leaders

Capitalize helps supply chain, purchasing, and logistics teams automate data prep, streamline reporting, and unlock advanced analytics — so you can move beyond spreadsheets and focus on resilience, cost savings, and performance.

Data Foundation
Vendor & Spend
Inventory & Forecasting
Logistics & Geospatial

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Unified Data Layer

Connect ERP, WMS, TMS, procurement, and other systems so you’re not stitching extracts together by hand.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Automated Data Prep

Cleanse, normalize, and join massive datasets using repeatable workflows instead of manual spreadsheets.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Consistent Metrics

Standardize definitions for fill rate, on-time performance, lead times, and more so everyone works from the same numbers.

[Contact Us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Vendor Performance Dashboards

Track pricing, on-time delivery, quality issues, and SLAs across suppliers and regions.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Spend Consolidation and Optimization

Identify consolidation opportunities, maverick spend, and negotiation leverage points.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Risk and Anomaly Detection

Use analytics to spot unusual activity, fraud indicators, or patterns that merit deeper review.

[Contact Us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Inventory Optimization Insights

Analyze stock levels, turns, and service metrics across locations to right-size inventory.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Demand Forecasting Support

Use historical data and external drivers to support more accurate forecasting and planning.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Scenario Modeling

Simulate the impact of demand spikes, supplier changes, or lead time shifts before they hit your operations.

[Contact Us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Route and Lane Analysis

Evaluate transportation routes, carriers, and modes to identify cost and performance opportunities.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### Network Visualization

Map suppliers, plants, DCs, and customers to see where risk and inefficiency are concentrated.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/check.svg)

###### What-If Simulations

Assess how changes to network design, sourcing, or logistics strategies will affect cost and service.

[Contact Us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

### Why Supply Chain Leaders Choose Capitalize

Supply chain teams work with some of the most complex, high-volume data in the business. You need partners who understand both that complexity _and_ the tools that can tame it.

1

Deep analytics expertise in operational data

We’ve worked with purchasing, inventory, logistics, and financial data across industries.

2

Automation plus enablement

We don’t just build reports — we help you automate processes and teach your team how to go further.

3

Business-first mindset

We focus on concrete outcomes — time saved, cycle times reduced, and better decisions — not just shiny dashboards.

#### Schedule a 30-Minute Consultation

If your team is spending days or weeks compiling data and never getting to the deeper analysis, there’s a better way. Let’s talk.

[Talk to An Expert](https://share.hsforms.com/1mcbE7TlTTEOh3rSC-2DCuAdko8c)

## Trusted Brands

[Skip to content](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/hr-workforce-analytics/#content)

# Upgrade Your Workforce Analytics So HR Can Lead, Not Just Report

Capitalize helps HR and Workforce Analytics Teams securely automate time consuming data prep, reporting, and data visualizations – so you can quickly answer tough questions about talent, retention, and cost without pulling all-nighters in Excel.

[Talk to an Expert](https://share.hsforms.com/1mcbE7TlTTEOh3rSC-2DCuAdko8c)

#### Our Technology Platforms

![Transparent Alteryx Logo 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Alteryx-Logo-165x60-1-e1771366817411.png)

![Transparent Snowflake logo 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Snowflake-logo-165x60-1.png)

![Transparent Tableau logo 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Tableau-logo-165x60-1.png)

![Workday Logo - Website Reel](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Workday-Logo-Website-Reel.png)

![Transparent Alteryx Logo 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Alteryx-Logo-165x60-1-e1771366817411.png)

![Transparent Snowflake logo 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Snowflake-logo-165x60-1.png)

![Transparent Tableau logo 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Tableau-logo-165x60-1.png)

![Workday Logo - Website Reel](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Workday-Logo-Website-Reel.png)

![Transparent Alteryx Logo 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Alteryx-Logo-165x60-1-e1771366817411.png)

![Transparent Snowflake logo 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Snowflake-logo-165x60-1.png)

![Transparent Tableau logo 165x60](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Transparent-Tableau-logo-165x60-1.png)

![Workday Logo - Website Reel](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Workday-Logo-Website-Reel.png)

### HR & Workforce Analytics: Big Expectations, Messy Data

Human resources, workforce analytics, and HRIS teams carry a huge range of responsibilities — and an even wider range of data sources.

On any given day, you’re asked to answer:

- How are we doing on talent acquisition and time-to-fill?

- Where are we at risk on turnover and retention?

- How are compensation and pay equity trending across roles and locations?

- What can we do to cut costs without hurting performance or culture?


And leaders expect fast, clear answers.

![workforce analytics hr workflow](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/workforce-analytics-hr-workflow.png)

### Why You Need to Upgrade Your Workforce Analytics

The questions aren’t getting simpler, the volume of data isn’t shrinking, and expectations definitely aren’t getting lower. HR teams need analytics that can keep up with constant requests, complex data sources, and fast decision cycles while maintaining data privacy.

- **Unified people data:** Bring together information from ATS, HRIS, payroll, LMS, performance, engagement, and survey tools into a single, trusted view.


- **Automated reporting:** Replace recurring manual reports and dashboards with automated, refreshable outputs that reduce fire drills and human error.


- **Advanced insight & “what ifs”:** Support predictive and scenario analysis — like attrition risk, hiring needs, and workforce planning — without rebuilding everything in Excel.


### What Capitalize Does for HR & Workforce Analytics Teams

Capitalize helps HR and HRIS teams automate manual processes, unify people data, and deliver insights in tools like Power BI, Alteryx, and modern data platforms — while upskilling your team to own and extend the solutions.

- **Eliminate fragile processes:** Move away from undocumented Excel and ad hoc SQL scripts to transparent, repeatable workflows.

- **Build reliable analytics:** Stand up consistent, governed pipelines and dashboards that leaders can rely on for decisions.

- **Refocus your team:** Free HR and analytics staff from data wrangling so they can spend more time on strategy, planning, and partnering with the business.


![hr team finance](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/hr-team-finance-.png)

[Contact Us](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/contact/)

### Why HR & Workforce Analytics Leaders Choose Capitalize

### Distribution Leaders Are Drowning in Data but Starved for Insight

Disconnected systems, manual processes, and inconsistent data make it nearly impossible to optimize inventory, pricing, supply chain performance, or customer profitability. Operational decisions are slowed down, analysts are overwhelmed, and opportunities slip through the cracks.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/distribution-.png)

### Modern Analytics That Keep Your Distribution Business Moving

A unified data and analytics foundation purpose-built for distributors — designed to eliminate silos, accelerate reporting, and enable proactive decision-making.

- **Integrated data pipelines:** Connect ERP, WMS, CRM, pricing tools, and supplier data into a single source of truth.

- **Automated analytics workflows:** Replace manual spreadsheets with governed, repeatable processes that scale.

- **Real-time performance insights:** Give leaders and teams immediate visibility into margins, inventory, and operational bottlenecks.


### We Turn Your Data Into Tangible Business Outcomes

Our consulting team helps distribution companies modernize their analytics ecosystems — without disrupting operations.

- **Deep distribution expertise:** We understand the nuances of SKU-heavy environments, complex pricing models, rebates, and vendor incentives.

- **End-to-end implementation:** From strategy to development to optimization, we build solutions that grow with your business.

- **Technology-agnostic guidance:** Whether you use Power BI, Alteryx, Snowflake, Azure, or legacy tools—we design the right solution for your environment.


![dashboard optimization analyst automation report data it business intelligence compliance workflow](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/dashboard-optimization-analyst-automation-report-data-it-business-intelligence-compliance-workflow-1024x576.png)

### Why Distribution Leaders Choose Capitalize

We partner with distribution organizations nationwide to deliver practical, measurable outcomes — not just dashboards.

We connect data to ROI

We speak distribution

data.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/career/southeast-territory-sales-executive/#content)

# Sales Executive

Capitalize is seeking a dynamic, driven, professional self-starter to join our team of rock stars.

The Sales Executive will work with and report to the Executive Vice President, Southeast, during an exciting period of growth, driving all areas of sales. The ideal candidate is passionate, energetic, and dedicated to the growth of the company and our core values. This individual will have strong communication skills and be able to simultaneously manage and grow multiple opportunities and projects.

We also operate under the “work from home” concept, which allows us to have a fluid, non-traditional, and relaxed culture while still having avenues in place to collaborate as a team. The ideal candidate should be located in **Tennessee, Kentucky, North Carolina, Virginia, West Virginia, Maryland, or Delaware** to align with the territory.

By joining our team, you will be given opportunities to solve unique challenges and be a part of something very exciting as you grow your career!

### Responsibilities:

- Develop a sales strategy for the market that ensures the attainment of company sales goals and profitability.
- Engage and build relationships with our vendor partners
- Build campaigns around vendor partner solutions
- Engage Analytics Delivery and Advisory Services leadership for support on opportunities
- Work with Sales Operations to register opportunities and generate quotes
- Support and/or manage outbound emailing campaigns, webinars, and industry-related blogs
- Provide advice and counsel to clients, oversight and accountability for delivery success, and client satisfaction
- Attend industry conferences to promote awareness of the Capitalize brand
- Track and manage all opportunities, contacts, and activities in Pipedrive (CRM)
- Participate in weekly Sales WIG, Touchpoint, and Event Planning calls
- Territory Management (Tennessee, Kentucky, North Carolina, Virginia, West Virginia, Maryland & Delaware)
- Readiness and ability to travel

### Qualifications:

- Bachelor’s degree in business, marketing, sales or related field of study, preferred
- 3 – 5 years of Software sales and or Consulting experience
- Proficient in marketing and sales campaigns
- Knowledge of process automation around data, analytics and business intelligence
- Familiar with Capitalize’s technology partners
- Candidates located in TN, KY, NC, VA, WV, MD, and DE are preferred

_Candidates must be legally authorized to work in the United States without sponsorship_

### Featured benefits

- Medical Insurance
- Vision Insurance
- Dental Insurance
- 401(k)
- Paid maternity leave

[Click Here to Apply](https://form.asana.com/?k=Qfg-AiADnLD8huzm1S127w&d=141291129639798)

# Inside Sales Representative – Michigan

**About the job**

Capitalize is seeking a dynamic, driven, professional self-starter to join our team of rock stars.

The Insides Sales Representative will work with and report to the Sales Executive during an exciting period of growth, driving all areas of sales. The ideal candidate is driven, energetic, and dedicated to the growth of the company and our core values. This individual will have strong communication skills and be able to simultaneously support and grow multiple opportunities and projects.

We also operate under the “work from home” concept which allows us to have a fluid, non-traditional and relaxed culture while still having avenues in place to collaborate as a team.

By joining our team, you will be given opportunities to solve unique challenges and be a part of something very exciting as you grow your career!

**Responsibilities**

- Collaborate closely with the Account Executive to identify, qualify, and pursue potential sales opportunities
- Conduct market research and leverage CRM tools to identify and potential leads, ensuring alignment with target customer criteria
- Assist in prospecting activities, including email outreach, cold calling, and social media engagement, to build a robust sales pipeline
- Manage smaller-scale opportunities independently, from initial contact through to closing, ensuring client satisfaction and alignment with business goals
- Contribute to team goals by sharing insights, collaborating on strategies, and supporting account planning efforts
- Build and nurture strong relationships with partner representatives to foster ongoing collaboration and mutual success
- Manage customer accounts and conduct regular check-ins to ensure client satisfaction and engagement

**Qualifications**

- Bachelor’s degree in business, marketing, sales or related field of study, preferred
- 1 – 3 years of sales experience
- Proficient in marketing and sales campaigns
- Knowledge around data analytics and business intelligence
- Candidate located in Michigan (Metro Detroit/Grand Rapids area preferred)

_Candidates must be legally authorized to work in the United States without sponsorship_

**Featured benefits**

- Medical insurance
- Vision insurance
- Dental insurance
- 401(k)
- Paid maternity leave

### Financial Data Is Growing Faster Than Leaders Can Analyze It

Volatility, economic swings, and evolving customer expectations have created an explosion in the volume, diversity, and complexity of financial data. Asset managers must track portfolio risk in real time. Banks must improve customer profitability while detecting fraud instantly. Credit, lending, and mortgage teams need accurate models to assess risk and predict behavior. And through it all, organizations must ensure compliance with an ever-expanding list of domestic and international regulations.

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/ai-data-governance-reports-dashboards.png)

### A Modern Analytics Foundation for High-Performance Financial Services

Capitalize helps financial services organizations integrate, automate, and analyze massive amounts of market, customer, operational, and regulatory data — so leaders can make smarter, faster, more informed decisions.

- **Unified financial data integration:** Consolidate market data, customer activity, portfolio performance, and operational metrics into a governed single source of truth.

- **Automated risk and performance analytics:** Accelerate insights for asset managers, lenders, banking teams, and operational leaders.

- **Compliance-ready reporting:** Support SEC, FRB, FDIC, FINRA, FSOC, EBA, GDPR, FATCA, MiFID, and other regulatory requirements with confidence.


### We Empower Financial Organizations to Analyze, Manage, and Act on Their Data

Our financial services experts help banks, asset managers, insurers, and credit/lending teams build analytics ecosystems that drive profitability and reduce risk.

- **Deep industry understanding:** From portfolio monitoring to creditworthiness modeling to fraud detection — our team has seen it end to end.

- **Insight at every level:** Track total assets under management, benchmark index performance, evaluate client-level risk, and monitor operational KPIs.

- **Strategic transformation:** We help you access, organize, structure, and leverage your data to fuel growth, protect clients, and meet regulatory obligations.


![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Process-Automation-6-1024x741.png)

### Analytics & Automation Solutions Built for Financial Services

### Why Financial Services Leaders Choose Capitalize

We help financial institutions strengthen performance, reduce risk, and stay compliant in an increasingly complex market environment.

1

We understand financial complexity

From end-to-end investment workflows to banking fraud detection to credit modeling.

2

We connect data to ROI

Improve client profitability, strengthen risk oversight, and accelerate decision-making.

3

We design for compliance and scale

[Skip to content](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/teams/eric-soden/#content)

# Eric Soden

Eric Soden is an analytics professional with more than 20 years of experience in management, technical presales, business analysis, enterprise reporting/analytics, data warehousing, and project management. He has served as a director of consulting services, solutions architect, vendor partner, trainer, and customer. His proven abilities in selling and implementing technical solutions in the private and public sectors help show management teams the value of business intelligence in solving real-world problems.

Before starting Capitalize Analytics, Eric led a division for an IBM partner. While there he directed the strategy and vision for his department including creating vendor partnerships to add value to both parties’ offerings. He also led many analytics projects that included ETL, data warehousing, predictive models, and data visualization.

Prior to starting Capitalize, Eric worked at IBM for over five years as solutions architect and account executive for IBM Cognos products, acting as a technical resource for clients evaluating analytics solution. He directed the sales team in demos, proofs-of-concepts, and RFP responses. He later became an outside sales account executive with responsibility for a 12-state territory from pipeline creation to close.

data.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/teams/dave-giang/#content)

# Dave Giang

Dave’s experience lies in implementing IT/Accounting projects, enhancing reporting/dashboarding capabilities, and bridging the gap between IT and the business. His expertise is within midstream oil and gas but has experience in different facets of IT and Accounting from acquisitions, divestitures, project management, interfacing applications and handling client accounts.

Through his six years of industry experience, Dave has managed a variety of projects, implemented a diverse set of software, supported custom legacy and COTS applications, developed solutions to replace proprietary applications, and created custom reports utilizing a wide range of reporting tools. He has used his understanding of data to bring value to customers and his experience in various roles allows him to understand the landscape of IT and how to improve the day-to-day lives of end users. His project management and communication skills allow him to deliver projects in a timely manner and serve as the point of contact to key stakeholders.

Dave joined Capitalize in 2020 as a Consultant within the Midstream sector. Prior to Capitalize, Dave spent 3 years at Targa Resources where he experienced role rotation across departments, giving him a diverse background and broad range of expertise. This includes application support, reporting and analytics within IT, and functional support within business. In these roles, he has implemented software, spearheaded and managed projects, acted as the liaison across departments, and used data to improve business processes. He has upgraded and implemented new assets into W Energy and developed new functionalities and interfaces such as GPEX within W Energy. Dave has implemented data warehousing strategies for big data and built Power BI reports to turn large amounts of data into easily digestible information. He has developed tools within Alteryx to replace custom applications, optimize workflows, and reduce manual efforts.

Dave’s experience within both IT and business allows him to better understand the full-scale needs of an organization and deliver value to his clients.

# Christopher McKay

Christopher McKay is an innovative technologist with experience in Finance and Accounting, Supply Chain/Logistics, and all-around Business Intelligence. His critical thinking and unique professional and educational experiences allow him to impact clients and Capitalize on multiple different levels.

Christopher currently leads a team of technical resources focused on optimizing FP&A departments leveraging technology and finance best practices.

Since joining Capitalize, Christopher has worked on analytics projects utilizing Alteryx, Workday Adaptive Planning, UiPath, Tableau, and multiple other software platforms. His work has consisted of client training, software implementation and maintenance, and process upgrades across Finance and Accounting, Supply Chain/Logistics, and other Business Intelligence-centered initiatives.

Christopher has a proven track record of strategic leadership and driving organizational growth through collaboration with firm-wide leaders and sales and marketing teams. His philosophy of meeting internal and external folks halfway enables him to deliver scalable, stable, and dynamic solutions.

Christopher prides himself on his ability to communicate with clients at all phases of the project to ensure appropriate levels of accuracy and completion are reached.

Christopher attended Belmont University while earning his Bachelor’s degree in International Economics.

Uriah’s passion for creating synergistic partnerships extends beyond his professional life. He actively engages with industry forums and networks, promoting collaboration and knowledge-sharing within the partner ecosystem.

Uriah Giordana’s educational background and dedication to fostering strategic partnerships make him an invaluable asset to Capitalize Analytics. His contributions continue to strengthen the company’s position as a leader in the industry and fuel its growth through collaborative initiatives.

# JT Morris

JT Morris is a veteran data professional with expertise in Data Science, Software Development, Technical Training, and Project Management. His distinctive ability to decode complex problems and articulate them in an accessible manner has been pivotal in ensuring transparent client communication and the delivery of top-tier, targeted solutions.

Embarking on his career journey at Capitalize as an Analyst, JT quickly showcased not only his impressive technical skills but also an unwavering work ethic, propelling him into the key role of Advanced Analytics Practice Lead. Merging his robust background in mathematics with computer science, he has successfully navigated the dual demands of technical and leadership roles, steering high-performing teams toward impactful business results.

JT’s extensive experience spans the creation and deployment of advanced analytics solutions across a multitude of industries and sectors, including Marketing, HR, Operations, and Supply Chain, among others. His expertise shines through his proficient use of industry-leading tools like Alteryx, Python, and Tableau, enabling him to automate data preparation, unearth patterns and trends from data, and transform these insights into actionable strategies for key decision-makers.

Beyond his technical expertise, JT excels as a consummate communicator and leader. He has a knack for translating complex technical language into digestible insights, ensuring stakeholders, regardless of their technical knowledge, can fully comprehend the information presented. Thriving in cross-functional environments, JT adeptly communicates findings and recommendations to executive leadership, ensuring that insights not only inform but also drive improvement.

# Andrew Trettel

Andrew Trettel is a skilled Certified Public Accountant and the driving force behind Capitalize’s Office of Finance Transformation Practice. With over a decade of experience gained at a prominent public accounting firm, Andrew has honed his expertise in financial processes and emerged as a trailblazer in digital transformation.

At Capitalize, Andrew leads a dynamic team of subject matter and technology experts, dedicated to streamlining and enhancing finance and accounting operations for clients spanning diverse industries. Drawing upon their profound technical acumen and specialized domain knowledge, Andrew and his team excel at orchestrating comprehensive solutions that optimize efficiency and deliver invaluable insights. Their visionary perspective allows them to craft time-saving strategies and harness industry-leading software to elevate client outcomes.

Throughout his career, Andrew has harnessed the power of data analytics to unlock exceptional value in consulting engagements. His portfolio includes overseeing substantial Alteryx implementations and spearheading governance and compliance strategies. Andrew also served as the functional lead on developing the Capitalize Office of Finance Blueprint – a groundbreaking resource empowering business users to embark on their analytics journey across Accounting, Audit, Tax, and other departments within the Office of Finance.

Andrew’s diverse portfolio showcases his ability to perform procedures and design tailored solutions for various industries, including manufacturing, retail, transportation, automotive, technology, investment, real estate holding entities, and construction.

He earned his BA in Accounting from Washington & Jefferson College, cementing the foundation of his extensive expertise and commitment to excellence.

# Jonathan Couch

Jonathan has 20 years of experience in the energy industry guiding industry-leading companies in optimizing system efficiencies, reducing costs, and surpassing business objectives. With expertise in gas plant accounting, management consulting, and cutting-edge technologies, he is dedicated to driving efficiency and leveraging innovation for the success of energy companies.

Jonathan is an information technology consultant with a 20-year track record of delivering solutions, fostering innovation, and devising tactical plans to enhance the daily operations of large-scale enterprises in the energy industry. With a comprehensive background encompassing software implementation and support, project management, management consulting, staff augmentation, and asset acquisitions/dispositions, Jonathan has consistently demonstrated his ability to drive impactful results.

Jonathan has expertise in gas plant accounting configuration and processes, particularly in Quorum Software’s gathering system and gas plant accounting solution (Quorum TIPS). He has played a pivotal role in guiding business decisions and providing valuable subject matter expertise to industry-leading companies such as DCP Midstream, Pioneer Natural Resources, Energy Transfer, Marathon Petroleum, and others.

Prior to joining Capitalize, Jonathan spent 17 years as a professional consultant at Quorum Software, where he developed an extensive functional understanding of the midstream energy space. His hands-on experience spans natural gas gathering, transportation, storage, and product refinement. During his tenure at Quorum, Jonathan successfully led multiple implementations of Quorum’s product suite.

Jonathan earned his BBA in Management and Economics, and his MBA in Finance at Texas Tech University.

# Shawn Mock

Shawn Mock is an experienced Analytics Professional with more than five years of Software Pre-Sales Engineering experience and more than seven years of Sales Operations, BI, and Process Improvement experience in the CPG and Retail industry. He is passionate about using data to optimize work and life. Shawn believes that great solution delivery starts with “having an analyst’s mind and a servant’s heart.”

Shawn, a dedicated thought leader with expertise spanning solution engineering, process improvement, business analytics, and sales operations, brings a wealth of experience and a proven record of driving revenue growth. With a solid foundation built on five years of software pre-sales engineering and seven years in Business Insights within the Consumer Packaged Goods (CPG) and Retail industries, Shawn possesses a unique blend of technical proficiency and industry insights. His strategic mindset and hands-on experience make him adept at translating intricate technical concepts into accessible and persuasive business solutions.

Shawn’s exceptional coaching skills and talent development prowess have consistently yielded outstanding results for his direct reports, mentees, and peers. In addition to his history of enhancing the careers of his coworkers, his competencies in project management, process enhancement, and advanced analytics have optimized operational efficiencies for past clients and stakeholders.

While Shawn has an MBA in Marketing/Entrepreneurship, much of his knowledge comes from putting analytics to work, in real-world business scenarios. His impressive career at Alteryx Inc. and Dr. Pepper Snapple Group showcases his talent for mentoring, delivering compelling solutions, and fostering valuable partnerships, making him an asset for Capitalize’s Analytics and Pre-Sales teams.

[Skip to content](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/tableau-training/#content)

# Tableau Training

Tableau training is an important milestone in your analytics journey. Our approach to [Tableau](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/tableau/) training and enablement consists of four phases, each successive phase building from one another. Many companies and individuals are interested in earning the **Tableau Certifications**. Our training path is designed to help you pass the **Tableau Desktop Specialist Certification**. Our phased approach includes:

1. Tableau Self-Study
2. Formal Tableau Training
1. Tableau Desktop: Fundamentals of Analysis
2. Tableau Desktop: Intermediate Analysis
3. Tableau Desktop: Advanced Analytics
4. Tableau Server: Managing and Administering Tableau Content
3. Tableau Mentoring
4. Ongoing Tableau Support

## Self-Study:

Tableau provides 1000+ hours of free video content that explores a wide variety of topics from setting data connections to administering Tableau Server. Before you pay to have professional trainers execute a **Tableau training program**, it is highly recommended that you or your team review the free Tableau video tutorials. In addition, Tableau touts an enthusiastic and helpful community of users, where ideas can be shared, and questions can be answered.

## Formal Training (Remote or Onsite):

In our experience, nothing can replace formal Tableau training with a live instructor. Whether you choose to do these trainings remotely or onsite, our trainers can gauge the audience and ensure the class is learning the skills they’ll need to be successful with Tableau. Our instructors increase or decrease the pace of the class based on the individuals in the class, cover skills multiple times if the concepts prove difficult for participants, and have years of consulting experience to reference. Hearing how others have used Tableau in the “real world” can bridge knowledge gaps that training exercises may not.

Our **formal Tableau training classes** also come with printed and bound materials. On average, we’ll provide approximately 100 pages of materials for each day of training containing demos, workshops, and screenshots to guide the participant every step of the way. We also provide data, starting points, and solutions so that attendees can refresh skills later, as needed.

## Mentoring:

Tableau mentoring allows users to create complex analytical content, with the assistance of an expert. Mentoring sessions are focused on real challenges and use cases that the attendee needs to complete. These one-on-one or small group sessions use the same methodology our consultants use to solve everyday challenges. That includes:

1. Holistic examination of the current process and challenges
2. Consideration of process improvements throughout
3. Building a solution together step-by-step to ensure knowledge transfer is ongoing and complete
4. Recap of the solution looking for ways to improve
5. Implementation of the final solution for long term use

Ongoing Support:

Professional tennis players still have coaches. Your team needs someone to call when they get stuck, come across a situation they’ve never seen, or want an expert to look over their solutions. Our ongoing support programs give your team a group of experts to call whenever they need guidance and advice. Whether they need 30 minutes of assistance troubleshooting a formula, or hours of coaching on a large analytic project, our consultants will be here to help.

## Tableau Training Course Catalog:

### Tableau Desktop: Tableau Fundamentals

|     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Interface Navigation | Calculations | Maps |
| Connecting to Data Sources | Focusing Data | Basic Formatting |
| Understanding Data Types | Creating Charts and Managing Basic Properties | Analytics in Tableau |

The goal of Tableau Fundamental is to create a solid base on Tableau fundamentals by learning the interface navigation, creating, and configuring basic visualizations, and creating a base of knowledge around data types. No prerequisites are required!

### Tableau Desktop: Tableau Intermediate

The goal of Tableau Intermediate is to build upon the fundamental Tableau course by incorporating dashboarding, statistical modeling, and advanced Tableau functionality, thus creating a robust skill set that allows users to create dynamic and visually appealing graphics. Tableau Fundamental Course is a prerequisite.

|     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Advanced Charting and Storytelling | Basics of Statistical Modeling in Tableau | Preparing your Data |
| Advanced Calculations and Customization | Advanced Mapping | Data Blending |
| Understanding Parameters | Creating and Using Input Controls |  |

### Tableau Desktop: Tableau Advanced

The goal of Tableau Advanced is to enhance the fundamental skills by incorporating powerful interactivity between visualizations, advanced dashboarding techniques, **data mining**, and a deep understanding of how calculations work and when to use them. Tableau Fundamental and Intermediate Course completion is a prerequisite.

|     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Refresher | Data Mining | Powerful Interactivity |
| Advanced Dashboarding | Creating a Story | Calculation Deep Dive |
| Level of Detail Calculations | Creating and Using Groups |  |

## Tableau Server Administration

If centralization and governance is at the forefront of mind for your company, this course will propel your understanding of how Server works and how to manage Tableau Server by managing users/groups, content, permissions.

[Skip to content](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/webinars/alteryx-users-streamline-your-external-audit-with-wam-with-insights-from-kpmg/#content)

Alteryx, Alteryx Governance

•

2023

## Alteryx Users: Streamline Your External Audit with WAM with Insights from KPMG

Organizations utilizing Alteryx to automate critical accounting processes will inevitably find their workflows come under internal and external audit.

Audit

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/upcoming-ribbon.png)

On Demand

Alteryx Users: Streamline Your External Audit with WAM with Insights from KPMG from Capitalize on Vimeo

![video thumbnail](https://i.vimeocdn.com/video/1697352209-31bae5ebe9c3f8064888c579fe1d055419e9c5cf21a3eeb723a01b0472b0f338-d?mw=80&q=85)

Playing in picture-in-picture

Play

00:00

59:27

CC/subtitlesSettingsTranscript

QualityAuto

SpeedNormal

CC/subtitlesOff

Picture-in-PictureFullscreen

Organizations utilizing Alteryx to automate critical accounting processes will inevitably find their workflows come under internal and external audit. Most organizations spend WEEKS creating audit support and fielding questions and requests from the auditors, and often still find themselves receiving pushback on their process, controls, and documentation.

Public accounting audit and assurance teams all have varying degrees of familiarity with and understanding of [Alteryx](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/alteryx/). Some may be very comfortable with Alteryx; others may see Alteryx as a “dangerous black box.” No matter their comfort level with Alteryx, any uncertainty or irregularities in your process, controls, or documentation is going to raise major red flags.

Governance frameworks, internal controls, assertion testing and validation reporting, and process documentation are all critical materials that are required to support your Alteryx usage. There hasn’t been an efficient, repeatable, and proven way to capture and create audit support documentation… UNTIL NOW!

[WAM](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/workflow-admin-manager/) takes an audit-centric focus for its one-click audit-ready Alteryx documentation, including:

- Detailed Workflow Process Documentation: every input, every output, every single tool
- Comprehensive Workflow History Reports: user workflow access, data source access, run history, version change history, development to production approvals
- Workflow Development Recommendations: best practices for creating efficient workflows
- Dozens of Additional Utilities: eliminating human error when administering hundreds or thousands of Alteryx jobs at scale

Hear from our featured guest [Erin Mitchell, KPMG Audit Manager](https://www.linkedin.com/in/erineckels/), as she shares her experiences providing Audit and Assurance services for Alteryx customers and how WAM solves many roadblocks during external audits.

Interested in learning more about WAM? Email us at [info@capitalizeconsulting.com](mailto:info@capitalizeconsulting.com) to get started!

[Skip to content](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/webinars/modernize-your-financial-consolidation-solution/#content)

Fluence

•

2023

## Modernize your Financial Consolidation Solution

Turn legacy solutions ending support into an opportunity.

AccountingFP&A

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/upcoming-ribbon.png)

On Demand

It’s no secret that legacy financial consolidation solution providers like SAP and Oracle are ending support for HFM and BPC. This creates a great deal of uncertainty and stress for finance and accounting teams who rely on these solutions to produce their consolidated financial statements. But the good news is, this can actually present an opportunity for finance and accounting teams to improve and modernize their financial consolidation solutions so they can close the books faster and do more with less.

Below is our panel discussion with Ross Kelderman, Sr Director of Finance and Accounting at Life Care Services, John Power, COO at [Fluence](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/webinar/consolidation-for-cadrex-in-just-10-weeks-with-fluence/) Technologies and Brian Zahn, Managing Partner from Capitalize Analytics on the benefits of replacing a legacy solution with a modern financial consolidation solution.

## Automation for Accountants: How BlackLine, Alteryx, and UiPath Can Shave Days Off Your Financial Close

Accelerate your financial close with technologies like BlackLine, Alteryx, and UiPath. Streamline reconciliations and reduce closing time efficiently.

Accounting

![](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/upcoming-ribbon.png)

On Demand

Automation for Accountants: How to Shave Days Off Your Financial Close Process from Capitalize on Vimeo

![video thumbnail](https://i.vimeocdn.com/video/1617661889-6468c6cc448c6db45cffc507c91398e824c5e21f5452492b6cb481c07a14082f-d?mw=80&q=85)

Playing in picture-in-picture

Play

00:00

53:47

QualityAuto
